EmailTemplate.description: First touch response to any cancellation request, to kick off the cancellation process.
EmailTemplate.name: First Touch Cancellation Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Cancellation Request
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for getting in touch with Kingsbridge.
You have made a request to cancel your insurance policy. We need further details from you to action your request.
Please call our team on 01242 808740 so we can action your cancellation.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
